recommendation: Two ratified re-opens landed on this CR, both from direct human course-correction rather than a cold-judge catch. Re-open #1 was a genuine, user-approved scope redefinition. Re-open #2 REVERSED a producer-proposed action (retiring the crew roster) the user had never asked for and that would have deleted working functionality -- caught only because the user was watching closely, not by any gate. Recommend the conductor's self-assert leash treat 'retire/delete an existing user-facing surface' as a hard Clearance-floor trigger requiring explicit confirmation even under auto-spec/auto-all leash, since no cold judge can catch a scope-widening deletion the spec itself does not yet describe.
